executive_summary.summary_text: The PH Platform Onboarding application has reached a production-grade 'Excellent' rating (5/5). Following the latest polish pass, all previously identified issues have been resolved. The application now features robust Zod-based form validation with detailed UI feedback, a centralized environment configuration system, and perfect visual consistency including correct icon imports and frosted-glass UI styling.

features.name: Landing Page & Registration

scenarios.name: Zod Validation
scenarios.notes: Invalid email inputs are caught client-side with clear, stylized error messages below the input field.

scenarios.name: Registration Workflow
scenarios.notes: API calls use centralized config; success redirects to verification seamlessly.

features.exploratory_notes: Tested rapid clicking on submit — loading state correctly disables button. Mobile mockup looks premium.

scenarios.name: Login Validation
scenarios.notes: Zod schema enforces 8-character minimum and valid email format with inline feedback.

scenarios.name: 1-Week Session Persistence
scenarios.notes: Verified localStorage implementation across all portal and onboarding routes.

scenarios.name: Visual Integrity
scenarios.notes: EnvelopeSimple icon import fixed. No fallback icons detected.

scenarios.name: Responsive Layout
scenarios.notes: Bento grid and cards adapt perfectly to mobile viewports with corrected padding.
